title: Items 40-45 — Parkside Held, BESS and Permits Ready
summary: Jimmy Monto confirms items 40-45. Items 40-41 (Parkside Commons) held again. Item 42 (Dr. LeMura honorary sign) ready. Items 43 (BESS moratorium), 44 (Pond Street special use permit), and 45 ready. Brief coordination on waiver for item 46 (EV charging JCOM agreement) between Councilors Majok and Nave.
